intended_use: FlightPlan for Embolization is a post processing software package that helps the analysis of 3D X-ray angiography images. Its output is intended to be used by physicians as an adjunct means to help vi
intended_use_full: FlightPlan for Embolization is a post processing software package that helps the analysis of 3D X-ray angiography images. Its output is intended to be used by physicians as an adjunct means to help visualize vasculature during the planning phase of embolization procedures. FlightPlan for Embolization is not intended to be used during therapy delivery.
target_condition: Embolization procedure planning across multiple anatomical sites (head, liver, prostate)
ground_truth: For vessel extraction: consensus of 3 board certified radiologists; For root definition: GEHC advanced application specialist
other_metrics: Vessel extraction algorithm success rate: 93.7% (acceptance criterion 90%); Root definition algorithm success rate: 95.2% (acceptance criterion 90%)
